title: New Bezel Frame Available!
body: We just pushed Safari Browser bezels. Open the editor to frame your web layouts.

title: Tip: 3D Tilts increase CTR
body: Tweets containing tilted device screenshots receive up to 35% higher click rates. Try adjusting the Y-rotation slider!

title: MockupBuilder Pro is live!
body: Unlock watermark removal and PDF design decks compiling options. Special launch offer available now.
